data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the payment collection functionality, specifically through Stripe, but there is no evidence provided that confirms the integration or operational status of payment processing. The linked use case mentions 'Payment collection (Stripe)' as a need, but the prior steps do not include any evidence of successful payment transactions or interactions with the Stripe API. This lack of evidence indicates a gap in meeting the requirement for payment collection.
gaps: No evidence confirming successful payment collection through Stripe.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
